case_title: HUTCHENS, LETICIA vs. BALBON, BRIAN IND/DBA BAY ADVANCED CHIROPRACTIC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUTCHENS, LETICIA AS TO DEFENDANT BALBON, BRIAN IND/DBA BAY ADVANCED CHIROPRACTIC
